subcodes.title: Words spoken at House of the Master in Haifa, 1920-11-04
subcodes.first_line: Not one among the former religions, such as the Jews, spoke a word of praise concerning His Holiness Christ or concerning His Holiness Muhammad.
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @newspapers and the media; publications, @suffering; rejection of Christ
